text.title: Cross-Tool Migration Basics Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the `spec` artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid and one invalid example, and a forbidden-pattern list. Validator at `scripts/validate-tool-migration-basics.py` enforces required keys.

example.note: Minimal example that passes the validator.
Fails: required fields missing or values outside their allowed range.

forbidden.pattern: TBD, TODO, FIXME, or placeholder text anywhere in the artefact body — strings are rejected by the validator.
Slug mismatch — `slug` field does not equal the directory slug.
Missing required field per schema — validator returns exit code 1 with the violating path.
Non-deterministic timestamps in `approved_at` or equivalent fields — must be ISO-8601 UTC.
